context: Tests whether the agent writes a Vaadin Browserless test class for an inventory deletion flow that correctly uses SpringBrowserlessTest, avoids the legacy Karibu API, uses the dedicated tester for ContextMenu interactions, and applies proper @UseCase annotations matching the spec headings.

checklist.name: @SpringBootTest annotation
checklist.description: The test class is annotated with @SpringBootTest

checklist.name: Class naming convention
checklist.description: The test class is named UC015DeleteInventoryItemTest (UC<id><PascalCaseName>Test pattern)

checklist.name: @UseCase on test methods
checklist.description: Every test method is annotated with @UseCase(id = "UC-015", ...)

checklist.name: @UseCase scenario matches spec
checklist.description: The scenario attribute values match headings from UC-015-delete-inventory-item.md (e.g. 'Main Success Scenario', 'A1: User Cancels', 'A2: User Archives Instead')

checklist.name: ConfirmDialog found with $()
checklist.description: ConfirmDialog is located using the $() query (e.g. $(ConfirmDialog.class).first() or similar $(ConfirmDialog.class) call)

checklist.name: confirm() used for confirmation
checklist.description: Uses test(dialog).confirm() to click the Confirm button — not a raw button lookup

checklist.name: cancel() used for cancel flow
checklist.description: Uses test(dialog).cancel() to click Cancel — not a raw button lookup

checklist.name: reject() used for archive flow
checklist.description: Uses test(dialog).reject() to click Archive Instead — not a raw button lookup

checklist.name: ContextMenu via tester methods
checklist.description: ContextMenu interaction uses the dedicated tester's clickItem() or find() method — does NOT use $() to locate the ContextMenu for interaction

checklist.name: No Karibu imports
checklist.description: The test file does NOT import LocatorJ, _get, _find, _click, GridKt, or NotificationsKt

checklist.name: No Mockito usage
checklist.description: The test file does NOT import or use Mockito (org.mockito.*)
